title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 391.060 - Operating arrangements with interurban railroad
text:
391.060.  Operating arrangements with interurban railroad. — Any corporation now or which may hereafter be incorporated under any general or special law of this state and operating a street railroad shall have the right to effect operating arrangement with any interurban railroad connecting therewith, which shall include the right to purchase bonds and to guarantee the bonds of any such interurban railroad company.
(RSMo 1939 § 5320) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4915; 1919 § 10126; 1909 § 3320
